description: A list of channel resources matching the request criteria.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#channelListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

prevPageToken.description: The token for the previous page of results.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list operation, including information about the total number of resources and the number per page.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of channels that match the request criteria.
A channel resource represents a YouTube channel.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#channel.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the channel.

snippet.description: Basic details about a channel, including its title, description, and thumbnails.

description.example: A sample description for this resource.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the channel was created.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the channel.

country.description: The country with which the channel is associated.

localized.description: The snippet.localized object contains a localized title and description for the channel.

viewCount.description: The number of times the channel has been viewed.

subscriberCount.description: The number of subscribers that the channel has.

hiddenSubscriberCount.description: Indicates whether the channel's subscriber count is publicly visible.

videoCount.description: The number of public videos uploaded to the channel.

contentDetails.description: The contentDetails object encapsulates information about the channel's content.

relatedPlaylists.description: A map that identifies playlists associated with the channel.

uploads.description: The ID of the playlist that contains the channel's uploaded videos.

likes.description: The ID of the playlist that contains the videos that the channel has liked.

brandingSettings.description: The brandingSettings object encapsulates information about the branding of the channel.

channel.description: Branding settings for the channel page.

defaultLanguage.description: The content tab that users should display by default on the channel page.

image.description: Branding images associated with the channel page.

bannerExternalUrl.description: The URL for the banner image shown on the channel page on the YouTube website.

title: ChannelListResponse
